title: Front Office Manager - EazyDiner Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - EazyDiner Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EazyDiner Ventures Solutions:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
